title: Native Android image sharing in Unity using FileProvider
summary: This particular script will help you to implement native Android image sharing using Android’s FileProvider in Unity. This is a fix for “android.os.FileUriExposedException” in Android 8 (Oreo) and above.
content: This particular script will help you to implement native Android image sharing using Android’s FileProvider in Unity. This is a fix for “android.os.FileUriExposedException” in Android 8 (Oreo) and above.
